message: fix: make golangci-lint compatible with go1.25

files.patch:
@@ -42,6 +42,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: golangci/golangci-lint-action@v6
         with:
           version: v1.64.8
+          install-mode: goinstall
           args: --timeout=5m
 
   govulncheck:
@@ -56,4 +57,3 @@ jobs:
         run: go install golang.org/x/vuln/cmd/govulncheck@latest
       - name: govulncheck
         run: govulncheck ./...
-
